chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-226 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 22-10-2025. Mr. Dilip Kumar advocate for the applicant. Mr. Dhani Bakhsh Mari, Assistant P.G. = Learned counsel for the applicant after arguing the matter at some length does not press instant application and seeks directions for earlier disposal of the case. In view of such statement, instant Criminal Miscellaneous application for cancellation of bail is dismissed as not pressed with direction to learned trial court to decide the case of the applicant/ complainant preferably within three months. JUDGE *Saleem*
